questions.question: Suppose we have an Integrated Moving Average (IMA) process of order 1 containing a unit root. What is the general form of the IMA process?
An IMA(1,1,1) process has a mean of 2 and a variance of 10. Find the value of β0 that ensures stationarity of the process.

A time series is modeled as an IMA(2,1) process with a constant term β0. The process has a conditional variance of 0.1 at time t=0. Find the expected value of β0 that ensures stationarity of the process.
